---
title: "May Goals"
date: "2026-05-02"
categories:
  - Monthly Goals
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Goals for May 2026

------------------------------------------------------------------------

1. Biomarkers: polished manuscript out to WDFW
2. Methylation: complete, semi-polished draft of the methylation work 
3. PhD Proposal: frame Chapters 3 & 4 with Steven, building on the first two while (1) creating new knowledge with what we already have, and (2) validating that new knowledge

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Goal 1 Plan: Biomarker Manuscript

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Status:
>
> Steps to meet the goal:

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Goal 2 Plan: Methylation Manuscript

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Status:
>
> Steps to meet the goal:

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Goal 3 Plan: PhD Proposal

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Status:
>
> Steps to meet the goal:
